sr_imported: Organizer imported — now make it yours
sr_reset: Arrangement reset to the form’s shape
sculpt_engine_failed: The sculpting engine could not load.
sculpt_failed: Sculpting failed — try a simpler description.
assess_failed: The coach could not respond — try again.
sr_assessed: Coaching feedback is ready below the builder panel
recall_needs_more: Add at least 4 ideas across 2 groups first
sr_recall_started: Recall mode: every idea fell into the tray. Put each one back where it belongs.
sr_recall_complete: You rebuilt your whole world from memory!
snapshot_failed: Could not capture the 3D view here.
title: Free Forms
tagline: Build your own World of Forms: pick an archetypal structure, fill it with YOUR ideas, arrange it in 3D, and sculpt what matters.
tagline2: You are the author here — the AI only coaches, and only when you ask.
keep_content_hint: Your groups and ideas stay — choosing a form just changes the shape of the space.
snapshot_tip: Save a picture of your 3D world
recall_tip: Your ideas fall into a tray — put them back from memory
assess_tip: Ask the AI coach to look at your whole composition
recall_instructions: Every idea fell out of its place into the tray at the bottom. Select an idea in the space, then use the group chips (or the [ and ] keys) to send it home. Nothing is saved during the game.
note_placeholder: Why does this idea live here?
no_3d: The 3D space could not load here — your builder panel still works, and everything you write is saved.
stage_hint: In the space: drag an idea to place it · drag the background to orbit · scroll to zoom · [ and ] move a selected idea between groups.
